Are you the one who created this place? Why does everyone have to keep fighting in the Spire...
Cards made from dreams. Warm magic, yet it cannot save anyone.
Even if my power is small, I have to try! Because... everything will definitely be alright!
THE_ARCHITECT.talk.SAKURAMOD-CLASSIC_SAK: Whoa! ...Whew, you startled me. Excuse me... are you the one who built this Spire?
Carrying those cards all this way. You think those toys can change the Spire's rules?
They're not toys, they're my friends! I'm going home with everyone... Release!
